instruction: Implement fib(n): return the nth Fibonacci number (0-indexed) where fib(0)==0, fib(1)==1, fib(n)==fib(n-1)+fib(n-2). fib(10)==55, fib(0)==0, fib(1)==1.

files.test_fib.py:
from fib import fib


def test_fib():
    assert fib(0) == 0
    assert fib(1) == 1
    assert fib(10) == 55
    assert fib(15) == 610
